description:
SUBSCRIBE
https://www.youtube.com/@govclose/?sub_confirmation=1

GovClose CERTIFICATION: https://www.govclose.com/sales-certification

Connect with Richard C. Howard
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/govclose

In this video, former Air Force acquisitions officer Rick Howard shows you how to use agency forecasts, industry days, and OTA portals to identify high-value federal contract leads before your competitors ever see them.

🔥 Want to become a certified federal sales executive or consultant?
Visit 👉 https://www.govclose.com

#GovClose #GovernmentContracts #FederalSales #GSA #OTAs #SAMgov #DoDContracts #PublicSectorSales #AcquisitionStrategy #SmallBusinessGovCon #SDVOSB

📌 Chapters / Timestamps

00:00 - How to find government contracts without SAM.gov
02:30 - What is an agency acquisition forecast and why it matters
04:00 - How to use Acquisitions.gov to spot early-stage opportunities
05:15 - Using industry day slides and attendee lists to build a network
06:45 - The Army PEO Forecast: Goldmine for teaming and subcontracting
08:15 - Avoiding the “spray and pray” proposal trap
09:00 - What to do when forecasts are outdated or removed
11:45 - Forecast data from Naval Surface Warfare Center
12:30 - How to use forecast spreadsheets to build a 3-year pipeline
13:15 - Understanding set-asides, contract types, and award timing
14:30 - How contract vehicles (GSA, SEAPORT, etc.) affect eligibility
15:45 - Using forecasts to identify sole-source and 8(a) opportunities
17:30 - Finding agencies most likely to award to SDVOSBs and VOSBs
18:45 - How to track contract timelines and funding changes
20:00 - Why agency websites are a treasure trove for GovCon insights
23:00 - How to register as a vendor with different agencies
24:30 - Department of Energy forecasting example
27:30 - Downloadable spreadsheets: what to look for
30:15 - The VA forecast: a must-use for SDVOSBs
32:30 - Common mistakes and missed links on agency portals
34:45 - Department of Transportation forecast: hit or miss
36:30 - Department of Treasury and DOJ: dashboards & hidden links
39:15 - NASA’s acquisition forecast spreadsheet
42:30 - How to validate forecasted opportunities on SAM.gov
45:00 - Finding 8(a) sole source contracts on SAM
47:15 - What to do if the incumbent graduated from 8(a)
49:00 - DIU and OTA: How to submit with a white paper
52:00 - Why drones and electronic warfare matter right now
54:00 - OTAs vs traditional FAR-based contracts
56:00 - Where to find OTA opportunities (DIU, Vulcan, etc.)
59:30 - Why watching global events helps predict funding
1:02:00 - Advice for manufacturing companies and early-stage tech
1:04:15 - Other Transaction Authority consortiums explained
1:06:30 - Evaluating open OTA opportunities before paying to join
1:09:00 - How to engage with contracting officers directly
1:10:45 - How AR and robotics companies should approach forecasting
1:13:00 - SBIR vs STTR: Where new tech companies should start
1:15:15 - How GovClose can help you build a pipeline or consulting business
1:20:00 - Success stories from GovClose-certified consultants
